attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.HEADER_ID,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ATTRIBUTE19,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CISCO_SHIPCONFIRM_DATE,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SERVICE_ENTITLEMENT_STATUS,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LINE_ID,
  'CG' GLOBAL_NAME,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.QUOTE_NUMBER,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.TAA,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.BUNDLE_LINE_ID,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.PROJECT_NUMBER,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.FOUNDATION_FLAG,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.BOOKING_PERCENT,
 TD_SYSFNLIB.OREPLACE(TD_SYSFNLIB.OREPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER,'[^!-~a-zA-Z0-9]+','',1,0,'i') , X'0d' , '') , X'0a' , '') AS SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ORIGINAL_PROMISE_DATE,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.RESELLER_BID,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.PAK_DELIVERY_PREF,
 /*FOLLOWING TWO COLUMNS added by OM LSS team*/
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SMT_LINE_ID,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
 /* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LEG0_TRANSITPAD,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LEG1_TRANSITPAD,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LEG2_TRANSITPAD,
  CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ORIGINAL_PROMISED_DELIVER_DATE,
 /* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
 /*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE,
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.REQUESTED_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
 /*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
 /* Q1FY16 column addition starts*/
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.DERIVED_CUST_REQ_SHIP_DATE,
 /* Q1FY16 column addition */ 
 COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SALES_MOTION,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID,-9999),
 /* Q3FY17 column addition */ 
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CONSOLIDATED_SET_ID,
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.PRE_ALIGN_PD,
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.PRE_ALIGN_SAD,
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.MFG_PO_ORG_ID,
 COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CORP_DEV_DEAL_NAME,'UNKNOWN'), /*Added as part of CORP DEV DEAL FLAG changes Q4FY18 July Release*/
 COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CORP_DEV_DEAL_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')/*Added as part of CORP DEV DEAL FLAG changes Q4FY18 July Release*/
 ,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') /*Added as part of ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM changes Q3FY19 Mar 10th Release*/
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.RTR_ELIGIBLE_FLG
 ,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.IN_COUNTRY_ROUTING_CD,'UNKNOWN')
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.STOCK_REPLENISHMENT, /*Added the column STOCK_REPLENISHMENT as part of 6th Oct 2019 Release*/
 COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.PBS_PARENT_LINE_ID,-999), /* added as part of acv@scale */
 COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.GROUP_LINE_ID,-999), /* added as part of acv@scale */
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ORIG_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE,
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CONTRACT_START_DATE,
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CONTRACT_END_DATE,
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.MAGIC_KEY
 /* ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ACV_FLAG
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG   
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ACV_AMOUNT
 /* END OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/ 
 ,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ORIG_MFG_PO_ORG_ID,-999)
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.NOAH_ELIGIBLE_FLAG/*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LEASE_CLASSIFICATION /* Athena june Scope*/
 ,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.USER_INTENT,'UNKNOWN') AS USER_INTENT /* SMR Nov-FY22 */
 ,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ATR_LINK_ID,-999) /*feb13th iACV*/
 ,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ORIGINAL_SO_LINE_ID,-999) /*Mar13 iACV*/
 ,COALESCE(CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ORIGINAL_SO_NUMBER,-999) /*Mar13 iacv*/
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.FEE_REF_LINE_ID  /*agannava : Added as part of Q3FY22 May Release*/
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER /* Added as part of may release*/
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_DATE
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID /*new 20 columns added for FY24 QTR2 dec-2023  release*/
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.RESELLER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.RESELLER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.RESELLER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.FREIGHT_PAYER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID 
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE /*new 20 columns added for FY24 QTR2 dec-2023  release*/
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CREATION_DATE
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.END_CUSTOMER_INFO
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_FLAG
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.ROLLUP_BUNDLE_END_DATE
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.TRIAL_REF_SO_NUMBER
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.TRIAL_REF_SO_LINE_ID
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER
 ,CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID
 FROM 
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E
 WHERE
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
 AND
 CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
 /*AND CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.CMS_SOURCE_CODE IS NULL*/ /* To handle converted orders added as part of CE AUS*/
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.LINE_ID ORDER BY CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
